news.headline: Pfizer’s Lyme disease vaccine shows 70% efficacy; Texas man sentenced to 12.5 years in $61.5M Medicare telemarketing fraud scheme; Novo Nordisk launches Wegovy subscription model – Morning Medical Update

DOJ sues OhioHealth over alleged anticompetitive hospital contracts; Novo to slash Ozempic, Wegovy prices up to 50% in 2027; lightweight ‘exoskeleton’ helps stroke survivors walk – Morning Medical Update
Novo to slash Ozempic, Wegovy prices up to 50% in 2027 – Morning Medical Update
news.summary: Novo confirmed it will cut U.S. list prices of Wegovy and Ozempic by roughly 50% and 35% respectively to about $675/month from January 1, 2027, aligning with newly negotiated Medicare prices (~$274/month) under the Inflation Reduction Act. The move pressures near-term U.S. gross margins but is designed to defend insured-patient volume against Eli Lilly's advancing obesity franchise.

news.headline: Novo Nordisk's denecimig (Mim8) demonstrated positive long-term safety and efficacy in phase 3 hemophilia A FRONTIER extension study at ISTH 2026
news.summary: Novo reported durable long-term safety and efficacy for its once-monthly hemophilia A antibody denecimig (Mim8) in the Phase 3 FRONTIER extension study, presented at ISTH 2026. The data supports pipeline diversification beyond the GLP-1 franchise into rare bleeding disorders.

news.headline: Novo Nordisk Foundation's €80M Grant Programme Backs Long-Term Science as Buyback and Analyst Upgrades Support Shares
news.summary: Coverage tied the Novo Nordisk Foundation's new €80M long-term science grant programme to the improving equity narrative, with ongoing DKK 15bn buybacks and analyst upgrades underpinning the recent share recovery. It framed capital returns and pipeline reinvestment as offsets to a soft near-term outlook.

news.headline: Novo Nordisk: Buyback Support and HSBC Upgrade Fuel Recovery, But Overbought Signals and Weak 2026 Outlook Cap Gains
news.summary: By mid-June Novo had repurchased nearly 20 million B shares under its DKK 15bn buyback programme, lifting treasury holdings to about 0.8% of capital, while an HSBC upgrade (price target raised to DKK 300) helped drive a roughly 20% 30-day rally. Analysts cautioned that overbought technicals and a weak 2026 guidance range limit further upside.

news.headline: CagriSema Diabetes Data Boost Before FDA Decision
news.summary: New CagriSema diabetes data presented at the ADA 2026 Scientific Sessions (New Orleans, June 5-8) reinforced the GLP-1/amylin combination's profile, with weight loss of up to ~23% in trials. The readout strengthens Novo's case ahead of an expected Q4 2026 FDA decision on its next-generation obesity drug.

news.headline: Novo Nordisk (NVO) Q1 2026 earnings: Wegovy sales jump as obesity care beats expectations
news.summary: Q1 2026 Wegovy sales rose 12% to DKK 18.2bn and adjusted obesity-care sales grew 22%, beating expectations even as Ozempic sales fell 8%. Novo narrowed full-year 2026 guidance to a 4-12% adjusted sales and operating profit decline, reflecting pricing pressure and intensifying competition from Eli Lilly's newly launched oral GLP-1 Foundayo.

catalysts.label: Q2 2026 earnings release
catalysts.detail: Interim financial report for H1 2026; investors will focus on Wegovy pill adoption, underlying obesity-care momentum ex one-off pricing, and any guidance revision.

catalysts.label: FDA decision on CagriSema
catalysts.detail: Expected FDA verdict on the first once-weekly GLP-1/amylin combination (semaglutide + cagrilintide) for chronic weight management; trials showed up to ~20-23% weight loss. Key re-rating catalyst.

catalysts.label: FDA decision on oral semaglutide 25 mg for obesity
catalysts.detail: Supplemental application for higher-dose oral semaglutide 25 mg in obesity under FDA review, with a decision expected by end of 2026 to broaden the oral GLP-1 franchise versus Lilly's orforglipron.

catalysts.label: Higher-dose CagriSema Phase 3 start
catalysts.detail: A higher-dose version of CagriSema is scheduled to enter Phase 3 in the second half of 2026; larger REDEFINE-11 outcomes study reads out in H1 2027.

catalysts.label: U.S. list-price cut takes effect
catalysts.detail: Wegovy, Ozempic and Rybelsus list prices drop to ~$675/month (roughly -50% / -35%), coinciding with new Medicare negotiated prices; a margin headwind but a volume-defense move.

pulse: Novo's GLP-1 franchise is stabilizing after a rough stretch: Q1 obesity-care sales rose 22% and the Wegovy injectable-plus-pill combo is defending roughly 65% of new U.S. prescriptions against Eli Lilly's newly launched Foundayo (orforglipron) pill. Sentiment has improved on an aggressive DKK 15bn buyback and an HSBC upgrade, but the setup is binary into 2H26. The Q4 CagriSema FDA decision and the oral semaglutide 25 mg review are the key upside triggers, while soft FY26 guidance (4-12% decline) and the January 2027 ~50% list-price cut cap near-term earnings.
